transcript: Speaker A (Man): ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇದ್ದೀರಾ? [What are you doing?] Speaker B (AI Robot): I am fan repairing. Haha... "I am fan repairing" ಅಲ್ಲ, "I am repairing a fan" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Haha... Not "I am fan repairing", you should say "I am repairing a fan".] Speaker A: ಹಾಗಾದ್ರೆ ನಾನು ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಯೋದು? [Then how do I learn English?] Speaker B: ತುಂಬಾ easy. ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ ಜಸ್ಟ್ 15 minutes ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು. ತುಂಬಾ ಬೇಗ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ fluently ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀರಾ. [Very easy. Just practice with me for 15 minutes every day. You will speak English fluently very quickly.] Speaker A: ಆದ್ರೆ ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಖರ್ಚಾಗುತ್ತಾ? [But will this cost a lot?] Speaker B: ಇಲ್ಲ ಇಲ್ಲ... ಕೇವಲ 1 rupee ಗೆ ಈ app ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. 1 crores+ people ಈಗಾಗಲೇ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತಾಯಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [No no... You can try this app completely for just 1 rupee. 1 crore+ people are already learning English with me.] Speaker A: ಸೂಪರ್, ಹೇಗೆ ಜಾಯಿನ್ ಆಗೋದು? [Super, how to join?] Speaker B: ಈಗಾಗಲೇ MySivi app ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ, ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯೋದು ಇವತ್ತೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. Click on install now and download MySivi app. [Download MySivi app now and start learning English today. Click on install now and download MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ [What doing] I AM FAN REPAIRING I AM REPAIRING A FAN ತುಂಬಾ EASY [Very easy] 15 MIN ಸಾಕು [Enough] ತುಂಬಾ ಬೇಗ [Very fast] FLUENTLY ಖರ್ಚು [Expense] 1 rupee ಈ APP ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ [This app completely] 1 CRORES+ PEOPLE ENGLISH ಸೂಪರ್ [Super] APP DOWNLOAD ಕಲಿಯೋದು [Learning] MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: An AI robot corrects a man's broken English while he repairs a ceiling fan. The robot explains that users can practice English for 15 minutes daily on the MySivi app. The ad promotes a 1-rupee trial offer and urges viewers to download the app.
